Lumify
Table of Contents

Class SmtpEmailService

Namespace
lumify.api.Services
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

IEmailService implementation that sends mail over SMTP via MailKit. SMTP credentials come from the Email configuration section (per environment). This is the only component that talks to the mail server.

public class SmtpEmailService : IEmailService
Inheritance
object
SmtpEmailService
Implements
IEmailService

Constructors

SmtpEmailService(IOptions<EmailSettings>, ILogger<SmtpEmailService>)

Creates the service with the bound e-mail settings and a logger.

public SmtpEmailService(IOptions<EmailSettings> settings, ILogger<SmtpEmailService> logger)

Parameters

settings IOptions<EmailSettings>
logger ILogger<SmtpEmailService>

Methods

SendPasswordResetEmailAsync(string, string?, string, CancellationToken)

Sends the password-reset mail containing the one-time reset link to the user.

public Task SendPasswordResetEmailAsync(string toEmail, string? displayName, string resetLink, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

toEmail string

The recipient's e-mail address.

displayName string

The recipient's display name for the greeting, if known.

resetLink string

The one-time reset link to embed.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the send operation.

Returns

Task

SendVerificationEmailAsync(string, string?, string, CancellationToken)

Sends the e-mail verification mail containing the one-time confirmation link to the user.

public Task SendVerificationEmailAsync(string toEmail, string? displayName, string verifyLink, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

toEmail string

The recipient's e-mail address.

displayName string

The recipient's display name for the greeting, if known.

verifyLink string

The one-time verification link to embed.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the send operation.

Returns

Task
